titleStmt.title: SII 9.677: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 677. (A.R. No. 215 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT YALPI-KAGGALLU, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1485, Rudhirōdgāri, Chaitra, śu. 10, Śu[kravāra], corresponding to A.D. 1563 April 2, Friday, f.d.t. ·36, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya who was ruling at Vidyānagara. It records that Raghunātharājayya-Mahā-arasu, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Tirumalarājayadēva-Mahā-arasu, confirmed the grant of a land made by him in the cyclic year Naḷa, Kārtika, śu. 12, corresponding to A.D. 1556 November 12, for the service of the god Siddhēśvaradēva at Kēmāna-Beḷugallu. The land granted was situated in Kaggallu on the bank of the river Hagarī, in the Rāyadurga-sīme.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgasirastuṁbi
caṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1485 neya rudhirōdgārisaṁvatsa
rada cayitra śu 10 śu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvamahā
rāyaru śrīvidyānagaradallu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi pruthvīrājyageyyuttiralu śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara rāmarāja tirumalarājayadēvamahāarasugaḷa komāra raghunātharājayya
dēvamahāarasugaḷu kēmāna beḷugalla siddhēśvaradēvara Amrutapaḍige Arcanāvrittige
koṭa bhūdānada silāśāsanada vivara rāyadurgada sīmege saluva hagarī tīrada kaggalla
grāmadalu Ā grāmakke �yośānyabhāgadalu kṛṣṇabhūmi kārustaḷa gadelu hucaparāvatana holanu sta
ḷa 2 kke bījavari 3 mūgaḷada holaṁnu śrītuṁgabhadrātīradalu . śrī
virupākṣaviṭhalara sa(ṁ)nnidhiyalli prāku naḷasaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 12 pu(ṁ)
ṇyakāladalu sahiraṇyōdakadhārapūrvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigaḷāgi kēmana be
ḷugalla sidhēśvaradēvara Amrutapaḍige Arcanāvidhige samarpisideU . �yo mānyakke tapi
davaru vāraṇāśiyalu gōu brā(ṁ)hmaṇara koṁda pāpake hōharu �yo samarpisi
da mūgaḷada kruṣṇabhūmivaḷagaṇa nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāsāṇa Akṣīṇi Ā
gāmi sidha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōga tēja sāṁmyavanu sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi
trivācā samarpisi pratiṣṭemāḍida silāśāsana . dānapālanayōrmadhyē
dānā chrēyōnupālanāda . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ ni
ṣphalaṁ bhavētu . svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā yō haraṁti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvaruṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī .
yidake tapidare kattetuṁṇi .
Digital edition of SII 9.677 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
